low_latency

It demonstrates the process of low latency capture, and comparison of the low-latency with ordinary capture by using MWCapture SDKv3 Pro Capture Functions.

Example directory:

SDKv3\Examples\VC++\all_example\low_latency

Supported Hardware

Pro Capture Family

Result
